displayName: Armor-Piercing Core Tip Steel (hardened tool steel)
notes: Hardened steel used for AP projectile cores and penetrator tips. High-carbon/high-hardness tool steel grade. RHAe ~1.15 relative to standard RHA for hardness-matched comparison per ARL-TR-4632 hardness correlation. Not used as armor but as reference material.

source.reference: Tool steel industry specifications, ARL-TR-4632 hardness-RHAe correlation
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from Brinell hardness ratio to RHA 280 BHN: 600/280 = 2.14, but actual ballistic performance vs AP is lower due to brittleness. Value 1.15 based on hardness correlation from ARL-TR-4632.
